product_updates.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
product_updates.content: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

product_updates.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
product_updates.content: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

product_updates.title: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
product_updates.content: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.

product_updates.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
product_updates.content: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

product_updates.title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
product_updates.content: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

product_updates.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
product_updates.content: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.

product_updates.title: FDA approval, fundraising, and the reality of building in healthcare according to BioticsAI founder
product_updates.content: BioticsAI CEO Robhy Bustami joined Isabelle Johannessen on Build Mode to discuss how the company has navigated a highly regulated space and kept the team motivated while cutting through all the red tape.

product_updates.title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles
product_updates.content: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

product_updates.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
product_updates.content: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

product_updates.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
product_updates.content: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The most severe Linux threat to surface in years catches the world flat-footed
technical_breakthroughs.content: CopyFail threatens multi-tenant servers, CI/CD work flows, Kubernetes containers, and more.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Exclusive eBook: Inside the stealthy startup that pitched brainless human clones
technical_breakthroughs.content: The ultimate plan to live forever is a brand new body. This subscriber-only eBook explores R3 Bio, a small startup that has pitched a startling and ethically charged vision for “brainless clones” to serve the role of backup human bodies. by Antonio Regalado March 20, 2026 Related Stories: Access …

technical_breakthroughs.title: This startup’s new mechanistic interpretability tool lets you debug LLMs
technical_breakthroughs.content: The San Francisco–based startup Goodfire just released a new tool, called Silico, that lets researchers and engineers peer inside an AI model and adjust its parameters—the settings that determine a model’s behavior—during training. This could give model makers more fine-grained control over how t…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Enabling a new model for healthcare with AI co-clinician
technical_breakthroughs.content: Researching the path to AI-augmented care and development of an AI co-clinician.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: the North Pole’s future and humanoid data
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
